brief_summary: Inline diagram for the H2 'The four-layer stack went standard'. A right-bracketed exploded side view of a mid-tier prebuilt cross-section, top-down: PBT doubleshot keycap row → factory-lubed switch row (with coral dotted highlight on the lube zone of one stem) → plate + gasket compression socks → dampening triple-stack (foam tape, silicone pad with hatching, poron strip on case wall). Four numbered labels along the right margin; bronze accents on the plate edges and one keycap legend line; faint baseline + tick rhythm matching sibling hero-art.
